profiler.c
Ir a la documentación de este archivo.
1#include "iq_bench.h"
2
7
8#include <stdlib.h>
9
10#ifdef _WIN32
11#include <windows.h>
12#include <psapi.h>
13#endif
14
19double now_ms(void)
20{
21 /* High-resolution monotonic timer for stage profiling. */
22#ifdef _WIN32
23 static LARGE_INTEGER freq = {0};
24 LARGE_INTEGER t;
25 if (freq.QuadPart == 0)
26 {
27 QueryPerformanceFrequency(&freq);
28 }
29 QueryPerformanceCounter(&t);
30 return (double)t.QuadPart * 1000.0 / (double)freq.QuadPart;
31#else
32 return 0.0;
33#endif
34}
35
40double process_rss_mb(void)
41{
42 /* Working set snapshot; useful as coarse memory trend signal. */
43#ifdef _WIN32
44 PROCESS_MEMORY_COUNTERS pmc;
45 if (GetProcessMemoryInfo(GetCurrentProcess(), &pmc, sizeof(pmc)))
46 {
47 return (double)pmc.WorkingSetSize / (1024.0 * 1024.0);
48 }
49#endif
50 return 0.0;
51}
52
57double process_peak_rss_mb(void)
58{
59#ifdef _WIN32
60 PROCESS_MEMORY_COUNTERS pmc;
61 if (GetProcessMemoryInfo(GetCurrentProcess(), &pmc, sizeof(pmc)))
62 {
63 return (double)pmc.PeakWorkingSetSize / (1024.0 * 1024.0);
64 }
65#endif
66 return 0.0;
67}
68
73double system_ram_percent(void)
74{
75#ifdef _WIN32
76 MEMORYSTATUSEX st;
77 st.dwLength = sizeof(st);
78 if (GlobalMemoryStatusEx(&st))
79 {
80 return (double)st.dwMemoryLoad;
81 }
82#endif
83 return 0.0;
84}
85
90void mem_tracker_init(mem_tracker_t *mt)
91{
92 /* Internal tracker, not a replacement for ASan/Valgrind. */
93 mt->alloc_count = 0;
94 mt->free_count = 0;
95 mt->bytes_current = 0;
96 mt->bytes_peak = 0;
97}
98
105void *mt_alloc(mem_tracker_t *mt, size_t bytes)
106{
107 /* Wrapper keeps allocation counters centralized. */
108 void *p = malloc(bytes);
109 if (!p)
110 {
111 return NULL;
112 }
113 mt->alloc_count += 1;
114 mt->bytes_current += bytes;
115 if (mt->bytes_current > mt->bytes_peak)
116 {
117 mt->bytes_peak = mt->bytes_current;
118 }
119 return p;
120}
121
128void mt_free(mem_tracker_t *mt, void *ptr, size_t bytes)
129{
130 /* Caller must pass the same size used at allocation for accurate accounting. */
131 if (!ptr)
132 {
133 return;
134 }
135 free(ptr);
136 mt->free_count += 1;
137 if (mt->bytes_current >= bytes)
138 {
139 mt->bytes_current -= bytes;
140 }
141 else
142 {
143 mt->bytes_current = 0;
144 }
145}
iq_bench.h
Interfaz publica del benchmark C para procesamiento IQ Metodo 3.

Retorna tiempo monotono en milisegundos.
